mainEntity.name: Is K&F Concept a Chinese company?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, K&F Concept is a Chinese company. It was founded in 2011 and is known for its photography accessories, including filters, tripods, and camera bags.

mainEntity.name: Can you stack K&F Concept filters?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you can stack K&F Concept filters. Their filter systems, including the Square System Pro Kit, allow users to stack multiple filters, enhancing creative effects like combining ND filters with a CPL.

mainEntity.name: Where does K&F Concept ship from?

acceptedAnswer.text: K&F Concept ships from China and has warehouses in the United States, United Kingdom, Germany, and other locations to facilitate faster delivery depending on the region.
K&F Concept is headquartered in Shenzhen, China. The company focuses on designing and manufacturing innovative photography and video equipment.
